subject: Fermi  trigger No 711805358: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:

(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)


MASTER-SAAO robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in South Africa (South African Astronomical Observatory) started inspect of the Fermi GRB230723.49 (trigger No 711805358,16h 37m 21.60s , -08d 20m 24.0s, R=3.59) errorbox  18869 sec after notice time and 18900 sec after trigger time at 2023-07-23 16:57:33 UT, with upper limit up to  20.0 mag. Observations started at twilight.  The observations began at zenith distance = 42 deg. The sun  altitude  is -13.0 deg. 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB230723.49 errorbox  46157 sec after notice time and 46188 sec after trigger time at 2023-07-24 00:32:21 UT, with upper limit up to  18.5 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 27 deg. The sun  altitude  is -33.5 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 24 deg., longitude l =  9 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2243778

We obtain a following upper limits.
